Executable , Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class MobileModel extends TypedCompositeActor This is a composite actor with an input port that accepts MoML descriptions of chang

ut port that accepts MoML descriptions of changes that are applied to the contents. Rather than specified before executing, the inside model can be dynamically changed either locally or remotely. Currently, the model that dynamically applied

ely. Currently, the model that dynamically applied to this actor is specified by a moml string from the modelString input. Currently, it only accepts models with one input and one output, and requires the model name its input port as "input

requires the model name its input port as "input", output port as "output". Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version: $Id: MobileModel.java,v 1.17.2.1 2004/08/01 17:46:35 cxh Exp $ Author: Yang Zhao See Also: Serialized Form Accepted Rating: Red (reviewmodera
